---
name: legacy-html-reporting
description: >
  Generates self-contained legacy HTML report artifacts for portfolio modernization
  output using the bundled GenDiscover legacy contract, references, and generator.
  Use whenever output/reports must include portfolio_modernization_report.html and
  application_report_<app_id>.html files with the legacy GenDiscover look and file names.
---

# Legacy HTML Reporting

Generate the legacy HTML package from the current run outputs without relying on any external
example directory. The HTML must be self-contained, deterministic, and visually aligned with the
legacy GenDiscover report shell defined in this skill.

## Goal

Keep Markdown reports as the primary source, then generate additional legacy HTML files:

- `output/reports/portfolio_modernization_report.html`
- `output/reports/application_reports/application_report_<app_id>.html`

The contract for the HTML shell lives in these bundled references:

- `references/legacy_contract.md`
- `references/portfolio_contract.md`
- `references/application_contract.md`
- `references/logo.svg`

Use the bundled generator when possible:

- `scripts/generate_legacy_html.py`

## Inputs

Use existing report data from the current run:

- `output/reports/portfolio_report.md`
- `output/reports/apps/<app_id>.md`

Optional structured inputs, when present, may be used to enrich the rendered content:

- `output/business_case_results/business_case.json`
- `output/scenario_applicability_results/scenario_assessment_<app_id>.json`
- `output/technology_assessment/technology_assessment_<app_id>.json`
- `output/complexity_results/complexity_<app_id>.json`

## Required Output Structure

```text
output/reports/
  portfolio_report.md
  portfolio_modernization_report.html
  apps/
    <app_id>.md
  application_reports/
    application_report_<app_id>.html
```

## Required Generation Flow

1. Read the bundled references before generating any HTML.
2. Prefer running the bundled script:

   `python .github/skills/legacy-html-reporting/scripts/generate_legacy_html.py --portfolio-md output/reports/portfolio_report.md --app-md-dir output/reports/apps --output-dir output/reports`

3. If the script cannot be used, generate HTML directly but keep the exact shell contract from the
   references.
4. Generate one portfolio HTML and one HTML file per available app Markdown report.

## Rules

- Do not remove Markdown outputs.
- Always create `output/reports/application_reports/` when at least one app report exists.
- Keep app ID naming exact (for example: `app001` -> `application_report_app001.html`).
- If an app Markdown report is missing, skip that app and note it in the final summary.
- HTML must be self-contained: no external JS, no external CSS, no runtime fetches, no CDN assets.
- Embed any normalized report payload needed by the page inside the HTML itself.
- Render the customer name as `Client` unless the current run provides a concrete replacement.
- Use the inline GenDiscover SVG logo from `references/logo.svg` in both header and footer.
- Preserve the legacy title patterns exactly:
  - Portfolio: `Portfolio Modernization Report - <customer_name> - GenDiscover`
  - Application: `Application Report - <application_name> - GenDiscover`
- Preserve the mandatory header line exactly:
  - `Application modernization with Agentic AI powered by Capgemini GenSuite`
- Preserve the mandatory footer label exactly:
  - `Generated by GenDiscover`
- Use deterministic `data-testid` attributes as defined in the references.
- HTML must be a deterministic rendering of current run data only; do not invent any application,
  financial, or roadmap data.

## JSON Handling Contract

- Do not fetch JSON files at runtime.
- If the page needs structured data beyond raw HTML, serialize it into a single embedded
  `<script type="application/json" id="report-data">...</script>` block.
- Any client-side rendering logic must read only from that embedded JSON block.
- Portfolio HTML may link to app HTML pages via relative links under `application_reports/`.

## Portable Runtime Constraint

- Do not mention or depend on `example_output_old`, temporary workspace paths, or any other
  environment-specific reference package.
- The skill must be fully usable with only current run outputs plus the files bundled in this skill.

## Validation

After generation, verify:

- `output/reports/portfolio_modernization_report.html` exists.
- Count of `output/reports/application_reports/application_report_*.html` equals count of `output/reports/apps/*.md` for available app reports.
- HTML files contain the expected title pattern and the text `Generated by GenDiscover`.
- HTML files are self-contained and do not contain `fetch(`, `<link rel="stylesheet"`, or external `<script src=` tags.
